description: While trying to teach a friend go, you showed him how to play atari go (first capture wins). Well, he didn't take very well to normal go, but he loves playing atari go. During a rather silly game, you realize you've gotten into a precarious position. You decide to get serious and take a real look at the board, but is there a way for you to win, or is it time to throw in the towel?
